General.Name: Flowing Cloud Technology Ltd
General.Description: Flowing Cloud Technology Ltd, through its subsidiaries, provides augmented reality/virtual reality marketing, content, and related services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company offers augmented reality/virtual reality/mixed reality AR/VR/MR, artificial intelligence AI, and big data. It also provides SaaS platform, an online AR/VR interactive content design, development, and distribution tools that enables users to create platforms that offers such as AR&VR exhibition, live-streaming, marketing, and content. In addition, the company provides anthropomorphism, perception, expression and cognitive abilities of AI virtual humans, leading to widespread applications in entertainment, media, finance, education and other fields. Additionally, it provides hologram box, VR360, and interactive touch table; and solutions including cultural tourism, education, industry, enterprise services, digital human, full-stack solutions, and online IP themed exhibition hall. The company serves its products to small and medium-sized enterprises in industries, such as e-commerce, education, and cultural tourism. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
General.Address: Shop 8, Jingyuan Art Center, Beijing, China
